analysis.summary_en: Mixed tape with TAIEX barely up (+0.16%) but huge dispersion underneath. MediaTek (2454) limit-up +9.93% and Hon Hai (2317) +5.27% on AI/Apple supply-chain optimism are masking weakness in TSMC (-1.1%) on the Bloomberg report that Apple is exploring Intel/Samsung for chip production. UMC (2303) +2.34% looks like sympathy/rotation rather than fundamental — its ADR was down. ASE (3711) local weakness vs ADR strength suggests overnight catch-up tomorrow.
analysis.summary_zh: 盤面分歧明顯,加權指數僅小漲0.16%,但個股差異極大。聯發科(2454)亮燈漲停+9.93%、鴻海(2317)+5.27%反映AI及蘋果供應鏈題材;但台積電(2330)因彭博報導蘋果探索Intel/Samsung代工而下跌1.1%。聯電(2303)+2.34%較像族群輪動而非基本面,其ADR反而下跌。日月光(3711)本地走弱但ADR走強,明日可能補漲。

key_stories.headline_en: Apple reportedly exploring Intel and Samsung for chip production, diversifying away from TSMC
key_stories.headline_zh: 蘋果傳探索Intel與三星代工,分散對台積電依賴
key_stories.analysis_en: This is the cleanest explanation for TSMC's -1.1% local weakness despite TSM ADR being +0.99% overnight (2.09% divergence). Mechanism: headline-driven de-rating from local retail/institutional readers of the Bloomberg story, even though realistically Apple cannot meaningfully shift leading-edge AP production within 2-3 years given Intel 18A yield uncertainty and Samsung's historical foundry struggles. The ADR shrugging it off suggests US investors view it as posturing/leverage rather than imminent loss. Likely overdone — TSMC's structural moat in N2/A16 and CoWoS for AI remains intact; Apple AP is meaningful but not the AI driver of the stock.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 此新聞最能解釋台積電本地下跌1.1%,而TSM ADR昨夜上漲0.99%的2.09%背離。機制:彭博報導引發本地散戶與法人標題式賣壓,但實際上蘋果在2-3年內難以大幅轉移先進製程AP生產(Intel 18A良率仍不確定,三星代工歷史表現不佳)。ADR未受影響顯示美方投資人視其為談判籌碼而非實質威脅。判斷可能反應過度——台積電在N2/A16及AI CoWoS的結構性護城河仍在,蘋果AP重要但非當前股價的AI驅動力。

key_stories.headline_en: MediaTek limit-up +9.93% — likely AI ASIC / Google TPU partnership tailwinds
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯發科亮燈漲停+9.93%——可能反映AI ASIC/Google TPU合作題材
key_stories.analysis_en: Volume spike with high=low=close at 3155 indicates limit-up. Today's news flow includes 'Google TPU push hits Nvidia neocloud grip' and Ardentec ramping AI ASIC testing — MediaTek is widely understood to co-design Google's TPU. The agentic AI/AP divergence story also helps. Single-day +9.93% is a large move; risk is buying at the top of a news-driven squeeze. Wait for follow-through volume tomorrow before chasing.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 量大且高低收皆在3155代表漲停鎖死。今日新聞包括「Google TPU挑戰Nvidia neocloud」及欣銓擴產AI ASIC測試——市場普遍認為聯發科參與Google TPU設計,加上agentic AI與AP分歧題材推升。單日+9.93%幅度大,追高風險為買在消息面噴出的高點。建議觀察明日量價是否續強再決定。

key_stories.headline_en: Hon Hai +5.27% on heavy volume — AI server / Apple supply chain
key_stories.headline_zh: 鴻海+5.27%大量成交——AI伺服器/蘋果供應鏈
key_stories.analysis_en: 160M shares traded with intraday range 227-240 shows broad accumulation. Drivers: Taiwan-US trade hitting US$78.25B in Q1 (AI servers cited as primary driver), and continued AI server build-out narrative. Hon Hai is the dominant AI server ODM. Move looks rational but extended; pullback to 230-232 would be a cleaner entry.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 成交量1.6億股、區間227-240顯示廣泛買盤。驅動因素:Q1台美貿易達782.5億美元(AI伺服器為主要驅動)、AI伺服器建置題材延續。鴻海為AI伺服器主要ODM。漲勢合理但已延伸,回測230-232會是更好進場點。

key_stories.headline_en: UMC +2.34% despite ADR -0.54% — sympathy rotation, not fundamentals
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯電+2.34%但ADR下跌0.54%——族群輪動,非基本面
key_stories.analysis_en: -2.88% ADR/local divergence is the largest in the table. With TSMC weak today, retail money likely rotated into mature-node foundry as a 'cheap semi' play. Nothing in news flow specifically supports UMC. Beware: this is the kind of move that reverses when TSMC stabilizes. Falsifier: if TSMC bounces tomorrow and UMC also rises, then it was real demand; if UMC fades, it was rotation noise.
key_stories.analysis_zh: ADR與本地背離-2.88%為表中最大。今日台積電走弱,散戶資金可能輪動至成熟製程晶圓代工作為「便宜的半導體」標的。新聞面無特定利多支持聯電。注意:此類走勢常在台積電穩定後反轉。否證條件:若明日台積電反彈且聯電同漲,代表真實需求;若聯電回落,則為輪動雜訊。

key_stories.headline_en: ASE Tech (3711) -0.95% local vs ADR +2.18% — overnight catch-up likely
key_stories.headline_zh: 日月光投控(3711)本地-0.95%但ADR+2.18%——明日可能補漲
key_stories.analysis_en: +3.13% divergence in ASE's favor on the ADR. Advanced packaging (CoWoS-S, FOPLP) demand remains the structural story; ASE benefits regardless of whether Apple diversifies foundry partners since OSAT is downstream. Actionable: watch for gap-up open tomorrow; if it doesn't gap, the divergence may be already discounted by some specific local concern not in the news flow.
key_stories.analysis_zh: ADR較本地高出3.13%。先進封裝(CoWoS-S、FOPLP)需求仍為結構性題材;無論蘋果是否分散代工,日月光作為下游OSAT皆受惠。可操作:留意明日是否跳空開高;若未跳空,可能本地已反映某些未見於新聞的特定疑慮。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ADR strong, local weak on Apple-Intel/Samsung headline. US holders unconcerned; local retail spooked. Likely partial reversal on next session if no follow-up news. Falsifier: confirmed Apple production allocation announcement.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: ADR強、本地因蘋果-Intel/三星新聞走弱。美方持有人不擔心,本地散戶受驚。若無後續消息,下一交易日可能部分反轉。否證:蘋果正式宣布產能分配。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ADR up sharply, local down. Largest unexplained gap in table. Watch for catch-up rally tomorrow morning unless local-specific bad news emerges.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: ADR大漲、本地下跌。表中最大未解釋缺口。除非出現本地特定利空,明日早盤可望補漲。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Himax ADR collapsed -6.09% overnight while local +2.79%. Local trading appears to have not yet absorbed ADR weakness — significant gap-down risk for 3504.TW next session. This is the highest-conviction directional read in today's data.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: Himax ADR昨夜暴跌6.09%,本地反而上漲2.79%。本地交易尚未消化ADR弱勢——奇景光電(3504)次日有顯著跳空下跌風險。此為今日資料中方向性最明確的訊號。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Local outperformed despite ADR weakness — rotation flow, fade risk.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 本地表現優於ADR——資金輪動推升,有回吐風險。
